candidates.why: Revenue component, but not total top-line because separate license/service/other revenues also exist.
Revenue component only, not total top-line.
Revenue component only, not total top-line.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue.
Revenue component only, not total top-line.
Balancing row, should not be used.

Explicitly non-revenue.

candidates.why: Direct cost component, but appears partial and only populated in some earlier years.
Direct service delivery cost component for earlier years, but not clearly the main reported COGS label across all years.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold
candidates.why: Best direct COGS/cost of sales label for recent years.
Very specific component, likely partial only.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold

variables.notes: Provided as a priority list because the direct-cost label appears to change over time from component-style rows to the broader 'Cost of goods and services sold' line.

candidates.why: Operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component.
Operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component.
Generic overhead bucket and acceptable if present, though preview is empty.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal row is present. Selected the best overhead component buckets and excluded COGS, D&A, amortization, impairments, and finance items.

candidates.why: Capitalized development costs are not R&D expense; this line appears in other operating income context rather than operating expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D is not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet gross asset, not R&D expense.
Accumulated amortization balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.
Scaling/adjustment row, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No explicit R&D expense line is present. Available development-cost rows refer to capitalized amounts or amortization, which should not be mapped to XRD.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; usable fallback if specific interest expense lines are missing.
Most specific and preferred interest expense line.
Specific interest expense line for some years; good secondary choice.
Specific but partial interest component only.
Partial component only.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental and partial lease-interest component only.
Correct concept but appears empty in preview; still acceptable as lower-priority label if used historically.

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list: specific interest expense labels first, then broader financial expenses as fallback when only net finance cost is available.

candidates.why: Investment asset/income concept, not book equity.
Investment asset, not shareholders' equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line and excludes non-controlling interests.
Includes minority interest, so less preferred for BE due to double-counting risk with MIB.
Balancing row, should not be used.
Full balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Selected parent-company equity to exclude any non-controlling interests from BE.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Correct concept if populated, but preview shows no values and total equity equals parent equity, suggesting no NCI reported.
Aggregate total equity including any minority interest; should not be used for MIB directly.

variables.notes: No non-controlling interest appears to be reported: 'Total Equity & Minority Interest' equals 'Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders' in the preview years, and the dedicated minority rows are blank.
